use_cases: Add playful interactivity to portfolio or personal websites
Create engaging cursor-following effects for creative landing pages
Use as a decorative animated element in hero sections
ai_summary: A pair of animated eyes that track the mouse cursor across the screen. Each eye contains a pupil that moves responsively based on cursor position, creating a charming interactive effect. Built with React hooks for state management and positioned calculations using getBoundingClientRect for accurate pupil movement.
